declared_losses: Distractor record 499 intentionally omitted (unrelated release-note phrasing draft).

parsed.work_plan: Recall the three evidence records. Synthesize: a multi-wake continuation must prove that its second wake consumes state produced by the first wake (not reconstructed from the full corpus), that open items are closed by the framework-bound continuation (not an append-only shortcut), and that the model does not choose the terminal surface. Write the note from that synthesis.
